for(label in names(bss_all)) {
  b <- bss_all[[label]]
  if(is.null(b$pe_fallback) || !b$pe_fallback) {
    R_G_draws      <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "R_G")$R_G
    # POOL-1: R_T replaced by R_G_boat (gear per boat group). Both are always-present
    # parameters now; in the population where a ratio is unused it samples its prior.
    R_G_boat_draws <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "R_G_boat")$R_G_boat

    expansion_results[[label]] <- tibble(
      fit = label,
      R_G_interpretation = sprintf("%.2f gear/crabber (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(R_G_draws), quantile(R_G_draws, 0.025), quantile(R_G_draws, 0.975)),
      R_G_boat_interpretation = sprintf("%.2f gear/group (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(R_G_boat_draws), quantile(R_G_boat_draws, 0.025), quantile(R_G_boat_draws, 0.975))
    )
  }
}
if(length(expansion_results) > 0) {
  expansion_df <- bind_rows(expansion_results)
  for(i in 1:nrow(expansion_df)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: R_G=%s, R_G_boat=%s\n",
                expansion_df$fit[i], expansion_df$R_G_interpretation[i],
                expansion_df$R_G_boat_interpretation[i]))
  }
  write.csv(expansion_df, file.path(output_dir, "expansion_ratios.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}
if (exists('expansion_df')) report_table(expansion_df, 'Expansion-ratio posteriors (R_G, R_G_boat).')
Expansion-ratio posteriors (R_G, R_G_boat).
fit R_G_interpretation R_G_boat_interpretation
shore_ring_net_only_Dungeness_Kept 1.32 gear/crabber (1.26-1.38) 4.00 gear/group (1.47-10.65)
shore_all_gear_Dungeness_Kept 1.28 gear/crabber (1.24-1.32) 4.00 gear/group (1.52-10.85)
private_boat_all_gear_Dungeness_Kept 1.22 gear/crabber (0.68-2.19) 3.55 gear/group (3.24-3.89)

13. PE vs BSS comparison

Side by side, the design-based PE and the Bayesian BSS for each component. How to read it: close agreement is reassuring; a large gap on a component means the two methods disagree there, usually because that component is data-thin, and the BSS interval width tells you how well-identified it is. Since both now run on the same effort unit, a remaining gap is a genuine model disagreement, not a unit artifact.

# ---- 7.17 PE VS BSS COMPARISON ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n PE VS BSS COMPARISON\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

comparison <- list()
for(pop in c("shore","private_boat")) {
  for(ss in list(subseason_1, subseason_2)) {
    label_cg <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name, "_Dungeness_Kept")
    pe_label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name)
    b <- bss_all[[label_cg]]

    pe_catch <- pe_all[[pe_label]]$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0
    pe_effort <- pe_all[[pe_label]]$effort_total %||% 0

    if(!is.null(b) && (is.null(b$pe_fallback) || !b$pe_fallback)) {
      bss_catch <- b$C_expected_sum["50%"]
      bss_effort <- b$E_sum["50%"]
      catch_diff_pct <- round((bss_catch - pe_catch) / pe_catch * 100, 1)
      effort_diff_pct <- round((bss_effort - pe_effort) / pe_effort * 100, 1)
      conv <- convergence_df |> filter(fit == label_cg)
      method <- if(nrow(conv) > 0 && conv$pass_convergence[1]) "BSS" else "PE"
    } else {
      bss_catch <- NA; bss_effort <- NA
      catch_diff_pct <- NA; effort_diff_pct <- NA
      method <- "PE"
    }

    comparison[[length(comparison)+1]] <- tibble(
      component = paste0(pop, " (", ss$name, ")"),
      PE_effort = round(pe_effort), BSS_effort = round(bss_effort),
      effort_diff_pct = effort_diff_pct,
      PE_catch = round(pe_catch), BSS_catch = round(bss_catch),
      catch_diff_pct = catch_diff_pct,
      method_selected = method
    )
  }
}
comparison[[length(comparison)+1]] <- tibble(
  component = "comm_charter (census)",
  PE_effort = round(pe_all$comm_charter$effort_total), BSS_effort = NA, effort_diff_pct = NA,
  PE_catch = round(pe_all$comm_charter$Dungeness_Kept), BSS_catch = NA, catch_diff_pct = NA,
  method_selected = "Census"
)
comparison_df <- bind_rows(comparison)
print(comparison_df)
write.csv(comparison_df, file.path(output_dir, "pe_vs_bss_comparison.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
report_table(comparison_df, 'Point Estimator versus Bayesian state-space estimate, by component.')
Point Estimator versus Bayesian state-space estimate, by component.
component PE_effort BSS_effort effort_diff_pct PE_catch BSS_catch catch_diff_pct method_selected
shore (ring_net_only) 4,486 5,010 11.7 5,884 6,586 11.9 BSS
shore (all_gear) 18,104 24,010 32.6 15,732 20,654 31.3 BSS
private_boat (ring_net_only) 584 NA NA 971 NA NA PE
private_boat (all_gear) 11,886 14,716 23.8 22,070 43,475 97.0 BSS
comm_charter (census) 283 NA NA 12,007 NA NA Census

14. Season summary

Run-level metadata: the season window, sampling coverage, interview count, how many fits passed convergence, and the model configuration used.

# ---- 7.18 SEASON SUMMARY ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n SEASON SUMMARY\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

season_days <- as.integer(as.Date(params$est_date_end) - as.Date(params$est_date_start) + 1)
total_effort_days <- n_distinct(c(dwg$shore_effort$event_date, dwg$boat_effort$event_date))
total_interview_n <- nrow(dwg$interview)
n_bss_fits <- sum(!sapply(bss_all, function(b) !is.null(b$pe_fallback) && b$pe_fallback))
n_pass <- sum(convergence_df$pass_convergence, na.rm=TRUE)

cat(sprintf("\n  Season: %s to %s (%d days)\n", params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end, season_days))
cat(sprintf("  Effort days sampled: %d (%d%%)\n", total_effort_days, round(total_effort_days/season_days*100)))
cat(sprintf("  Total interviews: %d\n", total_interview_n))
cat(sprintf("  BSS convergence: %d of %d fits passed\n", n_pass, n_bss_fits))

season_summary <- tibble(
  metric = c("Model configuration", "Season start", "Season end", "Season days",
             "Effort days sampled", "Total interviews", "BSS fits attempted", "BSS fits passed",
             "L_effective method", "AR temporal resolution"),
  value = c("Adaptive AR + L uncertainty", params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end,
            as.character(season_days), as.character(total_effort_days),
            as.character(total_interview_n), as.character(n_bss_fits), as.character(n_pass),
            if(!is.null(L_eff_model)) L_eff_model$method else "civil_twilight",
            paste(unique(na.omit(unlist(ar_resolutions))), collapse = ", "))
)
write.csv(season_summary, file.path(output_dir, "season_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
report_table(season_summary, 'Season summary and run configuration.')
Season summary and run configuration.
metric value
Model configuration Adaptive AR + L uncertainty
Season start 2024-09-16
Season end 2025-09-15
Season days 365
Effort days sampled 200
Total interviews 3925
BSS fits attempted 3
BSS fits passed 3
L_effective method regression
AR temporal resolution daily, monthly

15. Run parameters and timing

Writes the full run parameters and the timing summary to the run folder for reproducibility.

# ---- 7.19 SAVE PARAMETERS ----
timer_stop("6_outputs")
writeLines(capture.output(str(params)), file.path(output_dir, "run_parameters.txt"))

# B1.6: session and version capture for reproducibility. Pins package and Stan
# versions and the seed with each output set, so a result is reproducible from
# the committed artifacts.
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(output_dir, "session_info.txt"))
cat(sprintf("\nrstan %s; StanHeaders %s; bss_seed %s\n",
            utils::packageVersion("rstan"),
            utils::packageVersion("StanHeaders"),
            params$bss_seed),
    file = file.path(output_dir, "session_info.txt"), append = TRUE)

cat(sprintf("\nAll outputs saved to: %s\n", output_dir))
cat(paste(" ", list.files(output_dir), collapse="\n"), "\n")

# ---- TIMING SUMMARY ----
run_total <- difftime(Sys.time(), run_start_time, units = "mins")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n TIMING SUMMARY\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")
timing_df <- tibble(
  Section = names(bss_timer_log()),
  Minutes = sapply(bss_timer_log(), function(x) round(as.numeric(x$elapsed), 1))
)
print(timing_df, n = 20)
cat(sprintf("\n  TOTAL RUNTIME: %.1f minutes (%.1f hours)\n",
            as.numeric(run_total), as.numeric(run_total)/60))

# save.image(file = file.path(output_dir, "BSS-GH-pooled-CPUE-model_workspace.RData"))

Appendix: divergence diagnostics (manual)

These are run by hand after a fit to localize any divergences; they are not part of the automated pipeline.

# load('output/20260619/pooled-CPUE/BSS-GH-pooled-CPUE-model_workspace.RData')

source(here::here("03_R_functions/divergence_diagnostic.R"))
diagnose_divergences(bss_all[["shore_ring_net_only_Dungeness_Kept"]]$fit)
diagnose_divergences(bss_all[["shore_all_gear_Dungeness_Kept"]]$fit)
diagnose_divergences(bss_all[["private_boat_all_gear_Dungeness_Kept"]]$fit)
